title: Being a Student Leader - Part 1: Team Accountability [For Student-Run Clubs]
description: In hope that another student who's considering stepping up for leading a club might find this useful, I share here all the things I found useful during my time as a head in our student-run technical club

title: For JEE Aspirants: Things that worked for me
description: Some things that worked for me during my preparations. Even if you are not preparing for JEE, I hope this helps in some ways in preparations towards other stuff too!
